/usr/bin/ar qc liblinear_framework.a CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/linear_framework.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/list.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/list_doubly.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/list_singly.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/queue_array.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/queue_list.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/stack_array.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/stack_list.c.o CMakeFiles/linear_framework.dir/src/utils.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblinear_framework.a
